column1: **moistureNvars:** |br| Number of moisture species |br| *C-M if moistureSelector==1*
**moistureAdvSelectorQv:** |br| Water vapor advection scheme selector |br| *C-M if moistureSelector==1*
**moistureAdvSelectorQv_b:** |br| Hybrid advection scheme parameter for water vapor |br| *C-M if moistureSelector==1*
**moistureAdvSelectorQi:** |br| Moisture advection scheme selector for non-qv fields (non-oscillatory schemes) |br| *C-M if moistureSelector==1*
**moistureSGSturb:** |br| Selector to apply sub-grid scale diffusion to moisture fields |br| *C-M if moistureSelector==1*
**moistureCond:** |br| Selector to apply condensation to moisture fields |br| *C-M if moistureSelector==1*
**moistureCondTscale:** |br| Relaxation time in seconds |br| *C-M if moistureSelector==1*
**moistureCondBasePres:** |br| Selector to use base pressure for microphysics |br| *C-M if moistureSelector==1*
**moistureMPcallTscale:** |br| Time scale for microphysics to be called |br| *C-M if moistureSelector==1*
